final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire read_enable,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] unused_memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            unused_memory <= data_in;   // Write data to unused_memory on rising edge of clock
        end
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= unused_memory;  // Read data from unused_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
